priorities.title: Avatar disambiguation (anti-phase outer/inner pulse via performance.now())
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) avatarRenderer.ts: AVATAR_PULSE_HZ=1.2, AVATAR_PULSE_DEPTH=0.20 added as module-local constants (not constants.ts — pure UI feel, not gameplay). (2) sync() uses performance.now()/1000 as time source so pulse survives POSTGAME / physics-paused tab-foreground states. (3) Three layers: outer halo modulates outer alpha; mid ring uses Math.min(1, outer + 0.15) so it pulses coherently with outer (clamp protects against ceiling); inner core anti-phase at half-depth. (4) Pure function computeAvatarAlphas(t, baseOuter, baseInner, hz, depth) -> {outer, inner} exported for unit testability per S10 #test-via-pure-helper-export. (5) clamp01 internal helper ensures alphas in [0,1] for pathological tunings. (6) 7 tests in avatarRenderer.test.ts: t=0 returns base (phase=0); quarter-period (+1) outer=base+depth / inner anti-phase=base-depth/2; three-quarter-period (-1) inner clamp at 1.0; boundedness across wide-t domain; extreme depth clamp on outer (1.30->1.0); extreme depth clamp on inner (-0.15->0); period closure at t=1/hz. (7) Council R1: Grok #6 'chevron alternative' REJECTED (chevron only fires under motion; user complaint is static-cursor indistinguishability). Grok #C6 PEAT concern documented as tunable. Gemini concurred on pure-function pattern. (8) 223/223 tests pass (216 prior + 7 new). Typecheck clean (npx tsc -b --noEmit exit 0). Commit 0ccb3fe pushed.

priorities.title: Mechanical extraction placePrimitive -> src/state/placePrimitive.ts (zero behavior change)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) Mechanical move: placePrimitive() function (304 LOC) + makeBond() helper (17 LOC) extracted verbatim from world.ts to new src/state/placePrimitive.ts. (2) world.ts dropped 587 -> 228 LOC (-359, now under 500-LOC § XV soft charter — closes S13 PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward). placePrimitive.ts at 382 LOC (within charter; sized to absorb P2.1 redundancy bond logic). (3) PlacePrimitiveAction type defined + exported in placePrimitive.ts; world.ts composes GameAction with it (was inline). JSON shape unchanged — Phase 3 dispatchOverNetwork seam intact. (4) requirePlayer() promoted to export in world.ts (was file-local); placePrimitive.ts imports it. Single shared throw-on-missing semantics. (5) Removed-from-world.ts imports (now in placePrimitive.ts only): lookupCombo, MERGE_IMPULSE_MAGNITUDE, MIN_BOND_LENGTH_FOR_IMPULSE, SCORE_ANCHOR/FUNCTIONAL_BOND/MAGIC_BOND, SCORE_TIER_STEP, SPAWNER_CENTER_X/Y, SPAWNER_RADIUS, STRUCTURE_GROW_IMPULSE, StiffnessTier, makePrimitiveFromSpark, bfsHopMap, componentOf, Structure, tickBuildAction, asBondId, asPrimitiveId. Kept in world.ts (still used): ENERGY_PER_SECOND_FLAT, snapPrevPosForUnbonded, severSplit, CarryViolation, fsmDrop, makeIdlePlayer, fsmPickup, tickEnergy, Player, Spark, Primitive type, Bond, asPlayerId, Vec2. (6) Council R1: Grok #7 (LOC charter hypocrisy) + Gemini § 7.1 (refactor first, safer seam) both ADOPTED. The 'safer post-feature' framing in original PDR was inverted by Council; adopted the engineering-best-practice ordering. (7) 223/223 tests passing (identical to pre-extraction). Typecheck clean (npx tsc -b --noEmit exit 0). Commit 9bb784e pushed.

priorities.title: Multi-endpoint redundant bonding (K=3, 25-deg spread, no-score, DEV-invariant-checked)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) constants.ts: REDUNDANT_BOND_K=3, REDUNDANT_BOND_MIN_ANGLE_RAD=5π/36 (25° — Grok G3 softened from 30°), REDUNDANT_BOND_ANGLE_EPSILON=1e-6 (Gemini G3.8), REDUNDANT_BOND_MAX_CANDIDATES=16 (bounds O(N) cand sweep). (2) controls.ts: pickRedundantBondTargets() pure exported function — distance-sorted greedy angular-spread picker; angularDistance() helper also exported (wrapped-arc [0,π]). Controls.redundantBondTargetsInSameComponent() is thin wrapper computing componentOf + delegating (S10 #test-via-pure-helper-export). onUp now computes extraBondTargetIds when target !== null and passes to dispatch. (3) placePrimitive.ts: PlacePrimitiveAction gains optional extraBondTargetIds. After primary bond + mergedComponents populated, BEFORE merge sweep: iterate extraBondTargetIds with DEV invariant checks (self-id / primary-id / duplicate / missing-id / not-in-component) — malformed entries skipped + DEV console.error. Each valid entry creates a bond via makeBond + combo stiffness, emits BOND_COMMIT. DELIBERATE: no scoreProgress increment (Council G5/G8 — redundancy = defense, not score velocity; PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE stays 50). DELIBERATE: no MERGE_IMPULSE on intra-component bonds (would perturb equilibrium); STRUCTURE_GROW outward impulse on primaryPreExistingPrims naturally includes redundancy-bonded prims via component membership. (4) Tests session14.test.ts 29 cases across 5 groups (A pickRedundantBondTargets 10; B angularDistance 5; C placePrimitive E2E 6; D severSplit interaction 2 — cycle preserves on redundancy sever; E DEV invariant validation 5). (5) Council R1 disposition: Grok REVISE (8 challenges) — adopted G3 25°, G4 strain-cascade test, G5/G8 no-score, G7 extract-first (was P2.0); rejected G1 literal all-within-radius (defeats raid-resistance via colinear), G2 per-type maxDegree (Phase 2), G6 chevron (wrong for static-cursor), GA ports (Phase 2). Gemini REVISE (6 invariant stresses + 8 edge cases) — all applicable adopted. PRIME-AUDIT: verified bonds.ts:58 breaks on extension only → STRUCTURE_GROW radial 4% strain << HIGH-tier 25% break; verified Spec § VIII.4 sever cycle path preserves structure; verified scoreProgress contract preserved (no test regression on existing assertions); verified BOND_COMMIT visualEffectId per redundancy bond. (6) LOC: world.ts 228 (under charter), placePrimitive.ts 489 (under charter), controls.ts 565 (13% over — S15 carry-forward to extract pickRedundantBondTargets to its own file). (7) 252/252 tests passing (223 prior + 29 new). Typecheck clean (npx tsc -b --noEmit exit 0). Commit ab40447 pushed.

priorities.title: Closeout (BACKLOG + reflexion + boot snapshot + PDR archive + HANDOFF)
priorities.check_method: Closeout artifacts complete: BACKLOG.md S14 entry inserted above S13 (~95 LOC with full P1/P2.0/P2.1/P3 narrative + Council R1 adoption summary + 3 carry-forward blocks: playtest-gated re-tune, new charter PRIME-AUDIT on controls.ts, asset/Phase-2 gates unchanged). reflexion_log.md prepended with 5 S14 entries (#council-led-restructuring-as-prerequisite, #no-score-for-redundancy-clean-frame, #pure-function-extraction-for-class-method-testability, #verify-council-claim-with-source-not-narrative, SESSION #prime-audit-as-revision-gate-not-decoration); pruned 4 S6 entries (effects-renderer minutiae superseded by S8 animation/static split + S12 per-kind effect-renderer split) to maintain ≤50 cap; footer pruning note updated. boot-snapshot.md regenerated with S14 commit list, post-S14 state, new § XV charter PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward (controls.ts 565 LOC), and S14+S13 reflexion summaries. PDR moved (plain mv since plans/ are ephemeral .gitignored) to .claude/plans-archive/2026-05-12_PDR_Session_14_COMPLETED.md with full Battle Ledger + Council adoption tables + PRIME-AUDIT delta. HANDOFF_2026-05-12.md (S13 version) git-mv'd to .handoff-archive/HANDOFF_2026-05-12_S13_postS14.md; new S14 HANDOFF written at root. Final state: 252/252 tests passing (216 prior + 7 new avatarRenderer.test.ts + 29 new session14.test.ts). Typecheck clean. § XV charter: world.ts 228 LOC (closed S13 carry-forward via P2.0), placePrimitive.ts 489 LOC, controls.ts 565 LOC (new S15 carry-forward — extract pickRedundantBondTargets + angularDistance to src/input/redundantBondTargets.ts). 3 priority commits (0ccb3fe P1, 9bb784e P2.0, ab40447 P2.1) + closeout commit (05c5d72) on origin/master, all pushed.
